name: Dexter The Hamster
short_description: A short and exciting action platforming adventure! Help Dexter chomp and shoot his way out of the deceptively oppressive Happy Hamster Farms in 6 personality packed levels.
detailed_description:
Happy Hamster Farms isn't so happy after all.

Dexter's whole nine months of life has been surrounded by cold tile, fluorescent lighting, and Happy Hamster Farms' own genetically mutated "Deluxe Hamsters". When he sees a golden opportunity to escape, he knows he can't spend one more minute trapped in this horrific place.

Chomp and Shoot your way to freedom!

Dexter knows how to use what god gave him; He's got a great pair of cheeks and isn't afraid to use them!

Packed with secrets and lots of things to collect!

6 unique levels to beat and 12 collectibles to find! Find the secret level to get all there is to find!
